_doc: State file written by the Fireflies → PPL Dash auto-ingest scheduled task. Tracks which transcripts have been processed so re-runs are idempotent. Do not edit by hand unless you know what you're doing.
lastRunMessage: No new ground lessons since last run. Window scanned: 14 days from 2026-04-25, 15 transcripts retrieved (mine=true, limit=50). Two ground-lesson title matches found — both already ingested: GL4 (id 01KQ11RQGTTD1TVDJNDZ3TXQMZ, 'Ground Lesson 4 Apr 24, 05:48 PM') and GL5 (id 01KQXBR03YYE6NRPPFGDRHERG1, 'Ground lesson 5 May 05, 05:41 PM'). No GL6+ transcripts present yet. Remaining 13 transcripts are SkyAccess work meetings (JETNET/SKYACCESS 3-yr Aerodex deal, AMSTAT/Jet Access, FetchAir/Michael Kennedy, Yarrow Kubrin sales-leadership intro, Mohammed Arif/Skybridge, Flightworks, AirAlsie, Ayomide Josiah African market, May 08 trade-secrets/pricing call) — non-matching. No file edits, no commit.
